name: TinyCloud SDK Atlas
recipe: 1. Walk packages/* and read package.json + src/index.ts
2. Extract exports by recursively following `export *` chains in src/index.ts
3. Extract boundaries by walking every .ts/.tsx file under src/ and counting non-relative import specifiers
4. Merge with curated 'why' prose and curated boundary intent from atlas/curated/*.yaml
5. Compute drift hash = sha256('package.json:' + pj + '\nsrc/index.ts:' + idx); compare to previous run's per-package hash
